title: selaginella helvetica
intro: Selaginella helvetica, also known as the Alpine club moss or Spikemoss, is a type of lycophyte that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella helvetica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
